description:

reason: Paper confirmed via Perplexity search with matching title, author, year, arXiv ID (2308.03762), and DOI (10.48550/arXiv.2308.03762). Hosted on arXiv and cited in academic contexts, despite initial Semantic Scholar tool failure.
prompt_variant: You are a critical academic research verifier. Your task: determine if a bibliog...
_search_results:
**Yes, the paper exists.** Its exact title is **"GPT-4 Can't Reason"**, authored by **Konstantine Arkoudas**, published as a preprint on **arXiv** in **2023** with identifier **arXiv:2308.03762** (v1 submitted July 21, 2023; v2 revised August 10, 2023).[1][2][3]

The DOI is **10.48550/arXiv.2308.03762**.[2] It is a position paper critiquing GPT-4's reasoning abilities through qualitative analysis of 21 diverse problems, concluding the model is incapable of true reasoning despite occasional successes.[2][3] Semantic Scholar lists it with CorpusID 260704128 and notes 14 citations as of the latest data.[1]
Semantic Scholar: no matching paper found.
